1.premise: Financial responsibility in 2026 makes someone look weak.
Digital debt looks like wealth if the minus sign is hidden.
Being broke turns strip clubs into bargain hunting.

lines.text: - What's up, you filthy fucking animals?

lines.label: setup

lines.text: If you're making good financial decisions in 2026,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: man, you a bitch, okay?

lines.text: All right, listen, let me tell y'all something.

lines.text: If I pull my bank account up right now
lines.label: setup
